module_description: Monitors Microsoft 365 via the Microsoft Graph API (app-only authentication): SharePoint site + tenant storage, OneDrive storage, Exchange mailboxes over quota, service health/incidents, license capacity, app secret/certificate expiry, Secure Score and risky users. Each check is an opt-in toggle on the item. Requires an app registered in Azure AD/Entra ID with the relevant application permissions (admin consent): Sites.Read.All, Reports.Read.All, ServiceHealth.Read.All, Organization.Read.All, Application.Read.All, SecurityEvents.Read.All, IdentityRiskyUser.Read.All.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable this Microsoft 365 connection.
hints.threads: Number of Microsoft 365 connections to check in parallel.
hints.alert: Consecutive authentication failures before alerting (smooths transient blips).
hints.timeout: Default timeout for Graph requests, in seconds.
hints.tenant_id: The tenant id (GUID) or domain, e.g. contoso.onmicrosoft.com.
hints.client_id: The application (client) id of the Azure AD/Entra ID app registration.
hints.client_secret: The app's client secret. Stored encrypted. The app needs the application permissions Sites.Read.All and Reports.Read.All with admin consent. You can create it automatically with the button below (sign in as an admin and consent; no existing secret needed).
hints.check_site: Check a SharePoint site's drive storage quota (total, used and free).
hints.site: URL of the SharePoint site to watch, e.g. contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/Marketing. Leave empty to use the tenant root site.
hints.usage_pct: Warn when the site's used percentage reaches this value (1–100). On an item, leave it blank to inherit the module default; set the module value to 0 to disable it.
hints.free_min: Warn when the site's free space drops below this amount. On an item, leave it blank to inherit the module default; set the module value to 0 to disable it.
hints.free_unit: Unit for the free-space amount (MB, GB or TB).
hints.check_tenant_usage: Total SharePoint storage USED across the tenant, via the reports API. Graph exposes no pooled total, so the alert is on used amount.
hints.tenant_max: Warn when the tenant's total SharePoint usage exceeds this amount. 0 = informational only.
hints.tenant_unit: Unit for the tenant limit (GB or TB).
hints.check_health: Microsoft 365 service health: warns when any service is not fully operational (a service interruption is a hard error; degradation is a warning). Needs ServiceHealth.Read.All.
hints.health_services: Optional: limit to these services (comma-separated, substring match), e.g. 'Exchange Online, Microsoft Teams'. Blank = all services.
hints.check_licenses: Subscribed license (SKU) capacity: assigned vs available units. Needs Organization.Read.All.
hints.license_min: Warn when any SKU's free units (enabled − consumed) fall below this. 0 = warn only when a SKU is fully exhausted.
hints.check_secrets: This app's own client-secret / certificate expiry, so a monitor never dies on an expired secret. Needs Application.Read.All.
hints.secret_days: Warn this many days before the app's secret/certificate expires (an already-expired one always warns).
hints.check_mailbox: Exchange mailboxes over their storage quota (reports API). Needs Reports.Read.All.
hints.mailbox_over_max: Warn when the number of send/receive-prohibited (over-quota) mailboxes exceeds this. 0 = warn if any.
hints.check_onedrive: Total OneDrive storage USED across the tenant (reports API). Needs Reports.Read.All.
hints.onedrive_max: Warn when total OneDrive usage exceeds this amount. 0 = informational only.
hints.onedrive_unit: Unit for the OneDrive limit (GB or TB).
hints.check_secure_score: Microsoft Secure Score (current vs max, as a percentage). Needs SecurityEvents.Read.All.
hints.secure_min: Warn when the current Secure Score percentage drops below this (1–100). 0 = informational only.
hints.check_risky_users: Users currently flagged at risk by Entra ID Identity Protection. Needs IdentityRiskyUser.Read.All.
hints.risky_max: Warn when the number of at-risk users exceeds this. 0 = warn if any.

ui.discover_error: Could not fetch the sites. Check the credentials and permissions (Sites.Read.All).

messages.m3_lic_ok: M365: {} — {} license SKU(s), all with free units ✅
messages.m3_sec_none: M365: {} — no app credentials to check ✅
messages.m3_sec_ok: M365: {} — app credential valid for {} days ✅
messages.m3_mbx_ok: M365: {} — no mailboxes over quota ({} warned) ✅
